ddls:
CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "awardID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., Manager of the Year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "categoryID" INTEGER /* Category ID of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("awardID", "yearID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_categoryID FOREIGN KEY ("categoryID") REFERENCES categories ("categoryID")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_year" (
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yearID")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "categoryID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Manager of the Year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("categoryID")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nominationID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "awardID" TEXT /* ID of the award */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "categoryID" INTEGER /* Category ID of the award */,
  "playerID" TEXT /* ID of the player nominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nominationID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_yearID FOREIGN KEY ("yearID") REFERENCES award_year ("yearID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_categoryID FOREIGN KEY ("categoryID") REFERENCES categories ("categoryID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_playerID FOREIGN KEY ("playerID") REFERENCES players ("playerID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_awardID FOREIGN KEY ("awardID") REFERENCES awards ("awardID")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_rules" (
  "voting_ruleID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting rule */,
  "awardID" TEXT /* ID of the award */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "votes_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of votes allowed per voter */,
  "voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the voting period */,
  "voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the voting period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_ruleID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_rules_awardID FOREIGN KEY ("awardID") REFERENCES awards ("awardID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_rules_yearID FOREIGN KEY ("yearID") REFERENCES award_year ("yearID")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "voteID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "awardID" TEXT /* ID of the award */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "categoryID" INTEGER /* Category ID of the award */,
  "nominationID" INTEGER /* Nomination ID of the vote */,
  "voterID" INTEGER /* ID of the voter casting the vote */,
  "pointsWon" INTEGER /* Number of points won by the player */,
  "pointsMax" INTEGER /* Maximum number of points possible */,
  "votesFirst" INTEGER /* Number of first-place votes received by the player */,
  "voting_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voteID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_categoryID FOREIGN KEY ("categoryID") REFERENCES categories ("categoryID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_awardID FOREIGN KEY ("awardID") REFERENCES awards ("awardID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_voterID FOREIGN KEY ("voterID") REFERENCES voters ("voterID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_nominationID FOREIGN KEY ("nominationID") REFERENCES nominations ("nominationID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_yearID FOREIGN KEY ("yearID") REFERENCES award_year ("yearID")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "resultID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "awardID" TEXT /* ID of the award */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "categoryID" INTEGER /* Category ID of the award */,
  "nominationID" INTEGER /* Nomination ID of the result */,
  "pointsWon" INTEGER /* Number of points won by the player */,
  "pointsMax" INTEGER /* Maximum number of points possible */,
  "votesFirst" INTEGER /* Number of first-place votes received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resultID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_yearID FOREIGN KEY ("yearID") REFERENCES award_year ("yearID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_nominationID FOREIGN KEY ("nominationID") REFERENCES nominations ("nominationID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_categoryID FOREIGN KEY ("categoryID") REFERENCES categories ("categoryID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_awardID FOREIGN KEY ("awardID") REFERENCES awards ("awardID")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_winners" (
  "winnerID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner */,
  "awardID" TEXT /* ID of the award */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "categoryID" INTEGER /* Category ID of the award */,
  "nominationID" INTEGER /* Nomination ID of the winner */,
  "pointsWon" INTEGER /* Number of points won by the player */,
  "pointsMax" INTEGER /* Maximum number of points possible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winnerID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_categoryID FOREIGN KEY ("categoryID") REFERENCES categories ("categoryID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_awardID FOREIGN KEY ("awardID") REFERENCES awards ("awardID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_yearID FOREIGN KEY ("yearID") REFERENCES award_year ("yearID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_nominationID FOREIGN KEY ("nominationID") REFERENCES nominations ("nominationID")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_history" (
  "historyID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "awardID" TEXT /* ID of the award */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "categoryID" INTEGER /* Category ID of the award */,
  "nominationID" INTEGER /* Nomination ID of the history entry */,
  "pointsWon" INTEGER /* Number of points won by the player */,
  "pointsMax" INTEGER /* Maximum number of points possible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historyID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_history_yearID FOREIGN KEY ("yearID") REFERENCES award_year ("yearID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_history_nominationID FOREIGN KEY ("nominationID") REFERENCES nominations ("nominationID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_history_categoryID FOREIGN KEY ("categoryID") REFERENCES categories ("categoryID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_history_awardID FOREIGN KEY ("awardID") REFERENCES awards ("awardID")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "logID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., award creation, voting) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logID")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "lgID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., AL, NL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lgID")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "teamID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "lgID" TEXT /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teamID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lgID FOREIGN KEY ("lgID") REFERENCES leagues ("lgID")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "playerID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "teamID" TEXT /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playerID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_teamID FOREIGN KEY ("teamID") REFERENCES teams ("teamID")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voterID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the voter */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the voter (e.g., journalist, coach) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voterID")
)
